# Manifest of cmake-xray DOT report goldens (AP M5-1.3).
#
# Each non-comment, non-blank line names exactly one .dot golden file in
# this directory. tests/validate_dot_reports.py and the Graphviz dot -Tsvg
# CTest gate both consume this manifest and require directory/manifest
# parity.
#
# Tranche A creates this manifest empty; Tranche C adds the analyze and
# impact goldens that lock the DOT contract in place.
